description: Result of a complete workflow execution — legacy dev_sync style (src/shared/models/workflow_models.py). WorkflowResult and PhaseWorkflowResult coexist in the same module; the module docstring explicitly acknowledges the dual-shape: WorkflowResult is legacy (phases-of-ActionResult), PhaseWorkflowResult is the new constitutional shape (phases-of-PhaseResult). Both are in active use; no deprecation marker exists. ok, total_duration, total_actions, and failed_actions are @property derived values, not declared fields. WorkflowPhase (sibling: name + actions: list[ActionResult]) is the step container. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

workflow_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow execution.

phases.description: List of WorkflowPhase — each phase carries a name and a list[ActionResult]. Default empty list.
